title: Talking bomb
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:TALKINGBOMB.jpg|thumb|229px|The talking bomb]]

The '''talking bomb''', also referred to as '''"something elses"''' was an explosive device created by the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaughts]]. As indicated by the name, their primary feature involved a small turntable device made out of scraps containing audio parts that they saved from the disposal room on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]. The bombs themselves, however, were the size of a small room.

The talking bomb was quite intelligent for such a small component and even had a dry sense of humor and a bit of attitude.

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took over Cloud City shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], a talking bomb was left by revolting Ugnaughts to take out some of the Imperial forces.

[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Vollot]]'s squad of [[Bomb squad stormtrooper|bombtroopers]] were tricked by the talking bomb into detonating it, thus [[Death/Legends|killing]] themselves, with the force of the explosion being strong enough to temporarily destabilize the floating city.

At least twelve had been planted throughout Cloud City, including the one listed above.

==Behind the scenes==
The talking bomb was created by [[David Michelinie]], [[Walter Simonson]] and [[Tom Palmer]].
